notes: This manifest records the local public-input snapshot used for the committed results bundle.
For OSF files, users can fetch the same filenames and verify the hashes with scripts/verify_public_inputs.py.
For the vendored go-learning-eras bridge files, the exact upstream commit was not preserved during initial acquisition; the committed file hashes below are the repository's canonical local snapshot.
